rows.notes: Consensus on row type and empty amounts. Selected gpt-5-mini's description for including the period visible in the image.
This row was identified by gemini-flash. It is a clear year header visible in the left margin. gpt-5-mini missed this row.

rows.description: Nov 25. Recd of Mr Onslow. one half Yearly payment of Dr Shortridge's Benefaction. Due Mids. 1819
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Selected gemini-flash's description as it accurately reads payer and doctor names ('Onslow', 'Shortridge') and date (no '1820' prefix here) from the image. gpt-5-mini had errors in these details despite its note acknowledging some uncertainty.
rows.english_description: Receipt from Mr Onslow of the half-yearly payment due to Dr Shortridge's benefaction, due at Midsummer 1819.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Received from Mr Onslow the half-yearly payment of Dr Shortridge's benefaction, amounting to £110 0s 0d.

rows.description: 1820 Mar. 2. of Mr Rouse, for a Fence in Bathill piece, on account of Kidlington Allotment
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description derived from combining gemini-flash (date '2.', payer 'Rouse', place 'Bathill') and gpt-5-mini (place 'Kidlington' - 'l' is visible). Visual verification confirmed these choices.
rows.english_description: Receipt from Mr Rouse towards a fence in the Bathill piece relating to the Kidlington allotment.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt from Mr Rouse for a fence in Bathill piece on account of the Kidlington allotment, amounting to £4 0s 6d.

rows.description: Apr 21. Of the Oxford Canal Co a Rent of Cow & Sheep commons at Kidlington. 9 Yrs. to Xm. 1820
rows.notes: Amounts for pounds, shillings, and whole pence are consensus. Visually verified the fraction as '3/4' (0.75), confirming gemini-flash's reading over gpt-5-mini. Description combined: 'commons' from gemini-flash, 'Kidlington' from gpt-5-mini (visually confirmed 'l'). 'Xm. 1820' from gemini-flash is accurate.
rows.english_description: Rent received from the Oxford Canal Company for cow and sheep commons at Kidlington, covering nine years to Christmas 1820.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent from the Oxford Canal Company for cow and sheep commons at Kidlington for nine years to Christmas 1820, amounting to £7 11s 7¾d.

rows.description: Apr 22. Improved Rent of Lad Lane Due to the Coll. Chest viz. Recd Coll. Share. one third clear. L 6.13.0
rows.notes: Consensus on empty amounts and row type. Description derived from gemini-flash, correcting 'Retu' to 'Recd' based on visual inspection and confirming the full text and inline amount 'L 6.13.0'. gpt-5-mini incorrectly split this row and misread the inline amount as 'L 61:13:0'.
rows.english_description: Receipt of the college's share of the improved rent for Lad Lane; one-third clear to the college.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt of the college's share of the improved rent of Lad Lane (one third clear to the college), amounting to £6 13s 0d.

rows.notes: Consensus on empty amounts and row type. Description derived by combining gpt-5-mini's 'arrear' (visually confirmed) and gemini-flash's '9.6.0' (visually confirmed last digit is 0, not 8). Two dashes visually confirmed. gpt-5-mini's original row 6 was dropped as it was a mis-split of the previous entry.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Old rent in arrear, amounting to £9 6s 0d.

rows.description: of which 1/4 to the Coll. Chest. 4/ 52.7.0
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Selected gemini-flash's description and row type ('entry'), which are more accurate based on visual inspection. gpt-5-mini's description was truncated and incorrectly identified as 'total'.
rows.english_description: Allocation showing that one quarter of the amount is due to the College Chest (college share).
rows.english_description_with_amount: One quarter to the College Chest (college share), amounting to £13 1s 9d.

rows.description: May 3. Allowed by Dr I. Cole, arrear of the half Yearly payment of Dr Shortridge's Benef. Due Mids. 1819.
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Selected gemini-flash's description, which accurately reads the doctor's initial 'I.', surname 'Cole', 'Shortridge' for the benefaction, and the year '1819.', correcting gpt-5-mini's errors.
rows.english_description: Sum allowed by Dr I. Cole as an arrear of the half-yearly payment of Dr Shortridge's benefaction due Midsummer 1819.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Allowed by Dr I. Cole as arrears of the half-yearly payment of Dr Shortridge's benefaction due Midsummer 1819, amounting to £110 0s 0d.

rows.description: May 20. Recd of Mr Onslow. the second half Yearly payment of Dr Shortridge's Benefaction Due Xm. 1819
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Selected gemini-flash's description, which accurately reads payer name ('Onslow') and doctor's name ('Shortridge'), consistent with previous entries and visual confirmation.
rows.english_description: Receipt from Mr Onslow of the second half-yearly payment of Dr Shortridge's benefaction, due at Christmas 1819.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Received from Mr Onslow the second half-yearly payment of Dr Shortridge's benefaction due at Christmas 1819, amounting to £110 0s 0d.

rows.description: May 26. Recd of Bursar Hayes. Incrementum Domus for the half Yr. ending at Xmas. 1819
rows.notes: Consensus on shillings, pence, and fraction. Visually verified pounds as '171', confirming gemini-flash and correcting gpt-5-mini's '17'. Description from gemini-flash, as it is complete and accurate.
rows.english_description: Receipt from Bursar Hayes of the Incrementum Domus (house increment) for the half-year ending at Christmas 1819.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Received from Bursar Hayes the Incrementum Domus (house increment) for the half year ending at Christmas 1819, amounting to £171 5s 1½d.

rows.description: Recd of Mr Dalby. a bequest of Plate money from the late Mr Atkins: Gent. Comm. of this College
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Selected gemini-flash's description for punctuation consistency (colon after Atkins) with the image. gpt-5-mini noted minor ink irregularities which is a good observation but did not affect final value selection.
rows.english_description: Receipt from Mr Dalby of a bequest of plate money from the late Mr Atkins, gentleman commoner of the college.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Received from Mr Dalby a bequest of plate money from the late Mr Atkins (gentleman commoner of the college), amounting to £20 18s 5½d.

rows.description: July 5. Recd of Mr Rosdew. Dean's Fees to this day. 1820
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Selected gemini-flash's description for payer name ('Rosdew') and 'Fees' (plural), which are visually more accurate. gpt-5-mini's note acknowledging ambiguity in the name was helpful but its reading was less accurate.
rows.english_description: Receipt from Mr Rosdew of dean's fees up to this date (to 1820).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Received from Mr Rosdew the dean's fees to this day (1820), amounting to £34 14s 4d.

rows.description: Recd at Locke's & Biddulph's of Dr Shortridge's Trustees Interest of Timber money.
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Selected gemini-flash's description for the names 'Locke's & Biddulph's' and 'Shortridge's', which are more accurate upon visual inspection, despite gpt-5-mini's helpful note on legibility challenges.
rows.english_description: Receipt at Locke & Biddulph's from Dr Shortridge's trustees of interest owed on timber money.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Received at Locke & Biddulph's from Dr Shortridge's trustees the interest of timber money, amounting to £6 0s 0d.
